mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `${datatablename}`
`time`,
`id_device`,
`error`,
`low_alarm`,
`high_alarm`,
`Positiveactiveelectricity`, `Negativeactiveelectricity`, `Totalactiveelectricity`, `Activeelectricity`, `Positivereactiveelectricity`, `Negativereactiveelectricity`, `Totalreactiveelectricity`, `Reactiveelectricity`, `Positiveapparentelectricity`, `Negativeapparentelectricity`, `Totalapparentelectricity`, `Apparentelectricity`, `Rate1value`, `Rate2value`, `PhaseAcurrent`, `PhaseBcurrent`, `PhaseCcurrent`, `PhaseNcurrent`, `PhaseGcurrent`, `Averagecurrent`, `PhaseAcurrentunbalance`, `PhaseBcurrentunbalance`, `PhaseCcurrentunbalance`, `Worstcurrentunbalance`, `ABlinevoltage`, `BClinevoltage`, `CAlinevoltage`, `AverageLLlinevoltage`, `PhaseAvoltage`, `PhaseBvoltage`, `PhaseCvoltage`, `AveragePhasevoltage`, `ABlinevoltageunbalance`, `BClinevoltageunbalance`, `CAlinevoltageunbalance`, `WorstLLlinevoltageunbalance`, `PhaseAvoltageunbalance`, `PhaseBvoltageunbalance`, `PhaseCvoltageunbalance`, `WorstPhasevoltageunbalance`, `PhaseAactivepower`, `PhaseBactivepower`, `PhaseCactivepower`, `Activepower`, `PhaseAreactivepower`, `PhaseBreactivepower`, `PhaseCreactivepower`, `Reactivepower`, `PhaseAapparentpower`, `PhaseBapparentpower`, `PhaseCapparentpower`, `Apparentpower`, `PhaseApowerfactor`, `PhaseBpowerfactor`, `PhaseCpowerfactor`, `Powerfactor`, `PhaseAdisplacementpowerfactor`, `PhaseBdisplacementpowerfactor`, `PhaseCdisplacementpowerfactor`, `Displacementpowerfactor`, `Frequency`, `PowerfactorIEC`, `PowerfactorLeadLag`, `PowerfactorIECint`, `PowerfactorLeadLagint`, `Accumulatedenergyresetdatetime`, `Positiveactiveelectricity_INT64`, `Negativeactiveelectricity_INT64`, `Totalactiveelectricity_INT64`, `Activeelectricity_INT64`, `Positivereactiveelectricity_INT64`, `Negativereactiveelectricity_INT64`, `Totalreactiveelectricity_INT64`, `Reactiveelectricity_INT64`, `Positiveapparentelectricity_INT64`, `Negativeapparentelectricity_INT64`, `Totalapparentelectricity_INT64`, `Apparentelectricity_INT64`,
`nvmActivePower`,
`nvmActiveEnergy`,
`MeasuredProduction`,
#{time},
#{id_device},
#{error},
#{low_alarm},
#{high_alarm},
#{Positiveactiveelectricity}, #{Negativeactiveelectricity}, #{Totalactiveelectricity}, #{Activeelectricity}, #{Positivereactiveelectricity}, #{Negativereactiveelectricity}, #{Totalreactiveelectricity}, #{Reactiveelectricity}, #{Positiveapparentelectricity}, #{Negativeapparentelectricity}, #{Totalapparentelectricity}, #{Apparentelectricity}, #{Rate1value}, #{Rate2value}, #{PhaseAcurrent}, #{PhaseBcurrent}, #{PhaseCcurrent}, #{PhaseNcurrent}, #{PhaseGcurrent}, #{Averagecurrent}, #{PhaseAcurrentunbalance}, #{PhaseBcurrentunbalance}, #{PhaseCcurrentunbalance}, #{Worstcurrentunbalance}, #{ABlinevoltage}, #{BClinevoltage}, #{CAlinevoltage}, #{AverageLLlinevoltage}, #{PhaseAvoltage}, #{PhaseBvoltage}, #{PhaseCvoltage}, #{AveragePhasevoltage}, #{ABlinevoltageunbalance}, #{BClinevoltageunbalance}, #{CAlinevoltageunbalance}, #{WorstLLlinevoltageunbalance}, #{PhaseAvoltageunbalance}, #{PhaseBvoltageunbalance}, #{PhaseCvoltageunbalance}, #{WorstPhasevoltageunbalance}, #{PhaseAactivepower}, #{PhaseBactivepower}, #{PhaseCactivepower}, #{Activepower}, #{PhaseAreactivepower}, #{PhaseBreactivepower}, #{PhaseCreactivepower}, #{Reactivepower}, #{PhaseAapparentpower}, #{PhaseBapparentpower}, #{PhaseCapparentpower}, #{Apparentpower}, #{PhaseApowerfactor}, #{PhaseBpowerfactor}, #{PhaseCpowerfactor}, #{Powerfactor}, #{PhaseAdisplacementpowerfactor}, #{PhaseBdisplacementpowerfactor}, #{PhaseCdisplacementpowerfactor}, #{Displacementpowerfactor}, #{Frequency}, #{PowerfactorIEC}, #{PowerfactorLeadLag}, #{PowerfactorIECint}, #{PowerfactorLeadLagint}, #{Accumulatedenergyresetdatetime}, #{Positiveactiveelectricity_INT64}, #{Negativeactiveelectricity_INT64}, #{Totalactiveelectricity_INT64}, #{Activeelectricity_INT64}, #{Positivereactiveelectricity_INT64}, #{Negativereactiveelectricity_INT64}, #{Totalreactiveelectricity_INT64}, #{Reactiveelectricity_INT64}, #{Positiveapparentelectricity_INT64}, #{Negativeapparentelectricity_INT64}, #{Totalapparentelectricity_INT64}, #{Apparentelectricity_INT64},
#{nvmActivePower},
#{nvmActiveEnergy},
#{MeasuredProduction},
id_device = #{id_device},
`error` = #{error},
low_alarm = #{low_alarm},
high_alarm = #{high_alarm},
`Positiveactiveelectricity` = #{Positiveactiveelectricity}, `Negativeactiveelectricity` = #{Negativeactiveelectricity}, `Totalactiveelectricity` = #{Totalactiveelectricity}, `Activeelectricity` = #{Activeelectricity}, `Positivereactiveelectricity` = #{Positivereactiveelectricity}, `Negativereactiveelectricity` = #{Negativereactiveelectricity}, `Totalreactiveelectricity` = #{Totalreactiveelectricity}, `Reactiveelectricity` = #{Reactiveelectricity}, `Positiveapparentelectricity` = #{Positiveapparentelectricity}, `Negativeapparentelectricity` = #{Negativeapparentelectricity}, `Totalapparentelectricity` = #{Totalapparentelectricity}, `Apparentelectricity` = #{Apparentelectricity}, `Rate1value` = #{Rate1value}, `Rate2value` = #{Rate2value}, `PhaseAcurrent` = #{PhaseAcurrent}, `PhaseBcurrent` = #{PhaseBcurrent}, `PhaseCcurrent` = #{PhaseCcurrent}, `PhaseNcurrent` = #{PhaseNcurrent}, `PhaseGcurrent` = #{PhaseGcurrent}, `Averagecurrent` = #{Averagecurrent}, `PhaseAcurrentunbalance` = #{PhaseAcurrentunbalance}, `PhaseBcurrentunbalance` = #{PhaseBcurrentunbalance}, `PhaseCcurrentunbalance` = #{PhaseCcurrentunbalance}, `Worstcurrentunbalance` = #{Worstcurrentunbalance}, `ABlinevoltage` = #{ABlinevoltage}, `BClinevoltage` = #{BClinevoltage}, `CAlinevoltage` = #{CAlinevoltage}, `AverageLLlinevoltage` = #{AverageLLlinevoltage}, `PhaseAvoltage` = #{PhaseAvoltage}, `PhaseBvoltage` = #{PhaseBvoltage}, `PhaseCvoltage` = #{PhaseCvoltage}, `AveragePhasevoltage` = #{AveragePhasevoltage}, `ABlinevoltageunbalance` = #{ABlinevoltageunbalance}, `BClinevoltageunbalance` = #{BClinevoltageunbalance}, `CAlinevoltageunbalance` = #{CAlinevoltageunbalance}, `WorstLLlinevoltageunbalance` = #{WorstLLlinevoltageunbalance}, `PhaseAvoltageunbalance` = #{PhaseAvoltageunbalance}, `PhaseBvoltageunbalance` = #{PhaseBvoltageunbalance}, `PhaseCvoltageunbalance` = #{PhaseCvoltageunbalance}, `WorstPhasevoltageunbalance` = #{WorstPhasevoltageunbalance}, `PhaseAactivepower` = #{PhaseAactivepower}, `PhaseBactivepower` = #{PhaseBactivepower}, `PhaseCactivepower` = #{PhaseCactivepower}, `Activepower` = #{Activepower}, `PhaseAreactivepower` = #{PhaseAreactivepower}, `PhaseBreactivepower` = #{PhaseBreactivepower}, `PhaseCreactivepower` = #{PhaseCreactivepower}, `Reactivepower` = #{Reactivepower}, `PhaseAapparentpower` = #{PhaseAapparentpower}, `PhaseBapparentpower` = #{PhaseBapparentpower}, `PhaseCapparentpower` = #{PhaseCapparentpower}, `Apparentpower` = #{Apparentpower}, `PhaseApowerfactor` = #{PhaseApowerfactor}, `PhaseBpowerfactor` = #{PhaseBpowerfactor}, `PhaseCpowerfactor` = #{PhaseCpowerfactor}, `Powerfactor` = #{Powerfactor}, `PhaseAdisplacementpowerfactor` = #{PhaseAdisplacementpowerfactor}, `PhaseBdisplacementpowerfactor` = #{PhaseBdisplacementpowerfactor}, `PhaseCdisplacementpowerfactor` = #{PhaseCdisplacementpowerfactor}, `Displacementpowerfactor` = #{Displacementpowerfactor}, `Frequency` = #{Frequency}, `PowerfactorIEC` = #{PowerfactorIEC}, `PowerfactorLeadLag` = #{PowerfactorLeadLag}, `PowerfactorIECint` = #{PowerfactorIECint}, `PowerfactorLeadLagint` = #{PowerfactorLeadLagint}, `Accumulatedenergyresetdatetime` = #{Accumulatedenergyresetdatetime}, `Positiveactiveelectricity_INT64` = #{Positiveactiveelectricity_INT64}, `Negativeactiveelectricity_INT64` = #{Negativeactiveelectricity_INT64}, `Totalactiveelectricity_INT64` = #{Totalactiveelectricity_INT64}, `Activeelectricity_INT64` = #{Activeelectricity_INT64}, `Positivereactiveelectricity_INT64` = #{Positivereactiveelectricity_INT64}, `Negativereactiveelectricity_INT64` = #{Negativereactiveelectricity_INT64}, `Totalreactiveelectricity_INT64` = #{Totalreactiveelectricity_INT64}, `Reactiveelectricity_INT64` = #{Reactiveelectricity_INT64}, `Positiveapparentelectricity_INT64` = #{Positiveapparentelectricity_INT64}, `Negativeapparentelectricity_INT64` = #{Negativeapparentelectricity_INT64}, `Totalapparentelectricity_INT64` = #{Totalapparentelectricity_INT64}, `Apparentelectricity_INT64` = #{Apparentelectricity_INT64},
nvmActivePower = #{nvmActivePower},
nvmActiveEnergy = #{nvmActiveEnergy},
`MeasuredProduction` = #{MeasuredProduction},
